description_long: This is a round metallic pendant featuring a raised relief design at its center, possibly depicting a heraldic animal or mythical creature. The pendant is bordered by an engraved ring of text or symbols, giving it an antique or medieval appearance. A sturdy, cylindrical bail is attached at the top, allowing the pendant to be threaded onto a chain or cord. The surface of the pendant is glossy, with visible highlights and subtle patina, suggesting it is made of polished metal. The relief and engravings are moderately detailed, adding visual interest and texture to the piece. The overall design is bold and ornamental, suitable for display as a statement accessory.
description: A round, metallic pendant with a raised relief design and engraved border, featuring a glossy finish and a cylindrical bail for wearing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central relief and engraved border clearly, with the bail at the top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the thickness of the pendant and the hollow cylindrical bail.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the bail attachment and the pendant's edge, with less detail visible on the relief.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view shows the relief from another side and the bail's circular opening.
